title: Gautam Adani calls for India to build, power, and own AI infrastructure on home soil
description: Gautam Adani states energy and digital infrastructure will shape future global power. He urges India to build its own artificial intelligence capabilities. India must own its intelligence future, not rent it. The nation's scale offers unique advantages for AI and energy infrastructure. AI will expand productivity and create jobs. Adani Group is investing heavily in energy transition and digital infrastructure.

title: Dubai Launches World’s First AI-Powered Smart Bus Station with Solar Energy and Real-Time Crowd Tracking
description: Dubai has launched the worlds smart bus station that uses artificial intelligence at the Mall of the Emirates. This smart bus station has a lot of features like cameras that can track how many people are there at any given time. The bus station also uses energy from the sun. The people who made this bus station wanted to make sure that everyone who uses it is safe and that everything runs smoothly. They also wanted to make sure that the bus station is good for the environment. The smart bus station at the Mall of the Emirates is really a place because of all the new technology it uses. Dubais smart bus station is an example of smart mobility technology. The smart bus station is going to make a difference, in how people get around Dubai.
content: Dubai has just opened the worlds fully integrated smart bus station. This is a deal because it is a public transport hub that uses artificial intelligence, solar energy and real-time tracking to help people get around. The Roads and Transport Authori... [2780 chars]
